name: Talulah & Alina; Blood And Snow (Arknights)
description:
Talulah could feel distraught and paranoia fill her mind. It has been several hours past the agreed upon time Alina would've come back, stubborn Elafia woman. Why did Alina insist on going out alone?

Talulah should've known it. Something had gone horribly wrong.
creator: RPKAppreciator
